concerns.title: Open manhole on Mirpur 10 roundabout
concerns.description: There is a completely open manhole near the metro rail station entrance. It is extremely dangerous for pedestrians, especially at night when the streetlights are dim.

proposals.title: Create ward-level drainage status board
proposals.body: Every ward should publish a live drainage map with blocked lines, cleaning status, and the next maintenance date.
proposals.author: Dr. Rafiq Hasan

researchProblems.title: Flood-prone intersection prediction in Dhaka South
researchProblems.summary: Build a model that predicts flood-prone intersections using rainfall, drainage status, and past complaint density.

moderation.title: Proposal: anti-dumping zone near school
moderation.reason: Needs source citations and contractor references
